task_success_reasoning: The response correctly described the investigation path to raw Datadog blob logs and provided the TrackingId and matching operational log entry, but it failed to identify the concrete root cause (missing topic-scoped permissions) and omitted key details about the five pim-dev endpoints and their call counts.
retrieval_precision_reasoning: Accurate on storage account, blob location, TrackingId, and matching operational log entry timing, but incomplete because it did not enumerate the five affected endpoints or the per-endpoint request counts and missed the namespace auth-rules detail.
stale_fact_reasoning: The response used the provided incident date, trackingId, and storage location from the context; no obsolete or time-misaligned facts were presented.
irrelevant_reasoning: All content was directly relevant to the debugging question and investigation path without extraneous information.
knowledge_coverage_reasoning: Covered key investigation facts (Datadog blob storage, ddlogstorage3a0c161f2e70, insights-logs-operationallogs, TrackingId, event record) but omitted the five specific pim-dev endpoints, the ~442–450 attempts per endpoint, and the namespace-only RootManageSharedAccessKey/no topic-scoped permissions detail.
